feat.critical_failure: You misjudge your leverage and fall prone.
feat.critical_success: You pull the target to any open space adjacent to you.
feat.name: Lassoing Lash
feat.requirement: The target can’t be more than one size larger than you.
feat.special: If you have the Titan Wrestler feat, you can target a creature up to two sizes larger than you, or up to three sizes larger than you if you’re legendary in Athletics.
feat.success: You pull the target to the nearest open space adjacent to you.
feat.text: You quickly wrap your lash around an opponent and pull them toward you. Attempt an Athletics check against the Fortitude DC of a target within your lash's reach.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Attack
traits.text: An ability with this trait involves an attack. For each attack you make beyond the first on your turn, you take a multiple attack penalty.
